## Summary

Describe the change and the problem it solves.

## Verification

- [ ] `python -m unittest discover -s tests -v` passes
- [ ] Browser workflow was tested when UI or recognition behavior changed
- [ ] Documentation was updated when setup or behavior changed
- [ ] No database, face images, credentials, or attendance exports are included

## Privacy and security

Describe any effect on biometric data, camera frames, authentication, or data
retention. Write `None` when the change has no privacy or security impact.
